hero.title: A toolkit for studying the Qur'an.
hero.subtitle: Read, segment, and search — with structure, sources, and clear explanations.

apps.quranBody: Read the full text with verse-by-verse navigation, translations, and reading mode.
apps.segmentationBody: Break verses into thematic and grammatical segments for close study.
apps.searchBody: Open the search workspace for confidence-scored, structured results with explanations.

differentiators.heading: Why QGraph
differentiators.explainableBody: Every block carries a confidence score and a note on why it matches.
differentiators.structuredBody: Answers come grouped into typed blocks — direct matches, thematic context, analysis — not a flat list.
differentiators.guestBody: Search and explore without an account. Sign in when you want bookmarks and history.

search.metaDescription: Explore Qur'an verses with lexical and semantic search. This section is currently under active development.
search.placeholderDescription: We're building classic and semantic search with explainable ranking and richer filtering.

segmentation.metaDescription: Explore public and personal surah segmentation versions with safe editing workflows.
segmentation.heroTitle: Bird's-eye thematic segmentation for each surah.
segmentation.heroDescription: Browse featured public workspaces, compare segmentation versions, and build your own drafts with constrained editing and snapshot history.
segmentation.publicPanelDescription: Inspect public segmentation versions and thematic tags by workspace and surah.
segmentation.emptyVersions: No versions found for this selection.
segmentation.segmentsLoadError: Couldn't load segments for this version.
segmentation.emptySegments: This version has no segments yet.
segmentation.emptySegmentTags: No tags assigned to this segment.
segmentation.myPanelDescription: Create private drafts from scratch or fork public versions, then save immutable snapshots.
segmentation.authRequiredDescription: Sign in to create workspaces, edit segment boundaries, assign tags, and save new versions.
segmentation.emptyWorkspaceTags: No tags yet in this workspace.
segmentation.forkHintNoPublicSelection: Select a public version first to enable fork.
segmentation.versionCreateError: Failed to create a new version.
segmentation.editorContractMismatch: Ayah identifier mapping mismatch. Segment editing is disabled for this version.
segmentation.editorCoverageHint: Segmentation must cover the full surah with contiguous ranges before saving.
segmentation.emptyEditorSegments: No segments are loaded in the editor.
segmentation.selectVersionToEdit: Choose or create a version to start editing.
segmentation.snapshotSaved: Snapshot saved as a new version.
segmentation.ayahsLoadError: Couldn't load ayahs for this surah.
segmentation.segmentIdentifierMismatch: Ayah identifiers from segmentation and Quran text do not match for this surah.
segmentation.missingAyahText: Ayah text is not available for this range.

common.passwordResetAcknowledged: If an account exists for that email, we sent a reset link. Check your inbox.

signIn.title: Welcome back
signIn.description: Sign in to your QGraph account.
signIn.resetSuccessBanner: Your password was reset. You can now sign in.
signIn.inactiveUser: This account hasn't been activated yet. Check your email for the activation link.

signUp.title: Create your account
signUp.description: Use your email and a password, or continue with Google.
signUp.termsHint: By signing up, you agree to the terms of use.

checkEmail.title: Check your email
checkEmail.description: We sent an activation link to {email}. Click it to activate your account.
checkEmail.descriptionNoEmail: We sent you an activation email. Click the link inside to activate your account.

activate.errorDescription: The activation link may have expired or already been used.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.description: Enter the email associated with your account. We'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.doneDescription: If an account exists for {email}, a reset link is on its way.

resetConfirm.title: Choose a new password
resetConfirm.description: Enter a new password for your account.
resetConfirm.successDescription: You can now sign in with your new password.
resetConfirm.errorDescription: This reset link may have expired or already been used.

callback.errorDescription: We couldn't complete sign in with Google. Please try again.

account.title: Account
account.profileDescription: Update your name as it appears in QGraph.
account.changePasswordDescription: You'll stay signed in after changing your password.
account.changeEmailDescription: We'll send a confirmation link to the new address.
account.emailChangeRequested: Confirmation email sent to the new address.
account.deleteAccountDescription: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This cannot be undone.
account.deleteAccountConfirmDescription: This permanently deletes your account and all data. This cannot be undone.

emailConfirm.errorDescription: This confirmation link may have expired or already been used.

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.network: Couldn't reach the server. Check your connection.

codes.oauth_callback_failed: We couldn't complete the Google sign-in. Please try again.
codes.unknown: Something went wrong during authentication. Please try again.

index.title: One hundred and fourteen surahs.
index.subtitle: Read the canonical Arabic text, surah by surah.
index.metaDescription: Read the canonical Arabic Qur'an with clean surah navigation.

notFound.title: Surah not found.
notFound.body: There are one hundred and fourteen surahs in the Qur'ān.

error.title: Couldn't load this.
error.body: Something went wrong reaching the scripture service. Try again.
